Featured Projects

Production systems, open data initiatives, and AI infrastructure — each built to solve a real problem.

Data EngineeringProduction

Formula-1 Data Pipeline

End-to-end production data pipeline processing 70+ years of Formula 1 racing history. GDPR-compliant ingestion, Delta Lakehouse architecture with schema validation, and weekly orchestration delivering analytics via Power BI.

ADF → Azure Data Lake → Databricks → Power BI
DatabricksAzure Data LakePySparkADFPower BIDelta Lake
View on GitHub
AI InfrastructureRAG / Vectors

MongoDB Atlas Vector Search

Foundational RAG retrieval pipeline enabling semantic search over document collections using vector embeddings. Reference implementation for production AI systems with similarity-based document queries beyond keyword matching.

Query → Embed → [Vector DB] → Similarity → Response
MongoDB AtlasVector EmbeddingsRAGPythonPyMongoSemantic Search
View on GitHub
Civic TechFull-Stack🇧🇷 Open Data

Voto Explicado

Political transparency app translating Brazilian congressional votes into plain language. Pulls live data from the Chamber of Deputies public API, showing how parties and politicians vote on landmark legislation.

"Every citizen deserves to understand how their representatives vote."
Next.jsSupabaseTypeScriptCâmara APITailwind CSS
Live Demo Private repo — by design

Experience

6+ years from software engineer to senior ML engineer. Impact measured in metrics, not bullet points.

Machine Learning Engineer @ ReflexAI
March 2025 — Present
New York, USA (Remote)
  • ▸ Architected a production-grade LLM evaluation pipeline using LLM-as-a-judge, deployed on GCP Cloud Run with Terraform. Integrated LangFuse for prompt versioning and cost/metric tracking.
  • ▸ Productionized a generative persona creation system using LangGraph + LangChain, replacing a manual workflow and significantly reducing content creation bottlenecks.
Senior Data Scientist @ Thoughtworks
December 2023 — February 2025
Recife, Brazil
  • ▸ Productionized a pharmaceutical recommendation system on Databricks + PySpark + MLflow. Optimized the featurization stage achieving a 60%(cost reduction)$16,380→$312(per run)
  • ▸ Refactored the data preparation pipeline with spark.cache(), cutting runtime by 79.4%(faster runtime)3h15m→40min
Data Scientist @ CESAR
December 2021 — November 2023
Recife, Brazil
  • ▸ Built and optimized an ETL pipeline for a US tech client using Python + Docker + MySQL. Applied a Decorator pattern refactor that reduced execution time by 80%(faster ETL)
  • ▸ Developed KPI dashboards in Tableau integrated via REST API, achieving a 25%(process time saved)

Started as a Software Engineer (2019), building PHP/Symfony APIs and Ember.js frontends, before transitioning to Data Science in 2021.

About

I started building software systems. Then I learned how they break with data. Now I build the infrastructure that keeps AI systems reliable in production.

Over 6+ years spanning software engineering, data science, and ML engineering, I've shipped recommendation systems that cut costs by 60%, LLM evaluation pipelines running at scale on GCP, and civic tech applications that make government data accessible to everyone. I care about systems that are measurably better — not just working, but optimal.

My trajectory from Software Engineer → Data Scientist → ML Engineer gives me an unusual perspective: I understand how production systems fail, how data quality breaks models, and how infrastructure decisions compound over time. That's the lens I bring to every project.

Education

BSc Computer Science · Universidade Católica de Pernambuco 2016–2020
